THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, JEREMIAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WRODKOWSKI, MAREK THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM FOR DEFAMATION OR MALICIOUS PROSECUTION.
